title: eulophia stylites
intro: Eulophia stylites, also known as the 'Snake Lily' or 'Snake Orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Eulophia stylites include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and other respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
